adds.rationale: Largest US nuclear fleet operator is the cleanest pre-date proxy for the profile's 'fission renaissance via utility PPAs with data centers' thesis; Q1 2024 earnings beat and a year-to-date rally reflect rising market conviction that AI data-center load growth will reprice baseload nuclear generation.

news_evidence.summary: Constellation Energy Q1 2024 earnings beat with management calling out AI/data-center demand as a structural tailwind for its nuclear fleet.
Range Nuclear Renaissance ETF (NUKZ) launches as a dedicated US nuclear-renaissance vehicle, signaling structural investor demand for the theme.
Goldman Sachs research highlights AI-driven data center power demand as a multi-year tailwind for baseload generators, with nuclear utilities flagged as a primary beneficiary.

removes.rationale: Fundamentals deteriorated in H1 2024 (first YoY delivery decline since 2020, 10% workforce reduction, Cybertruck recall) and the AI bucket is overcrowded at 6 names; trimming TSLA frees a slot for the nuclear theme the profile names as a near-term commercial wave.

news_evidence.summary: Tesla Q1 2024 deliveries fall 8.5% YoY to ~387K, the first annual delivery decline since 2020.
Tesla announces roughly 10% global workforce reduction (~14,000 employees) amid demand slowdown and margin pressure.
Tesla recalls all ~3,878 Cybertrucks delivered to date over a stuck-accelerator-pedal defect, denting the launch narrative.

rationale_overall: Net effect: one swap that tilts the watchlist away from an overcrowded AI bucket and toward the nuclear-renaissance wave the profile flags as the most near-term commercial 'next wave.' Replacing a fundamentally softening TSLA with CEG, the cleanest US listed nuclear-baseload play, expresses the profile's view that AI's electricity hunger is the most concrete cross-wave catalyst visible as of mid-2024.
